attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, use Config tool.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.

--- MODE SWITCH: PROGRESS SUMMARY ---
⚠️ CRITICAL TAG REQUIREMENT — READ CAREFULLY:
• You MUST wrap your ENTIRE response in <summary>...</summary> tags.
• Do NOT use <observation> tags. <observation> output will be DISCARDED and cause a system error.
• The ONLY accepted root tag is <summary>. Any other root tag is a protocol violation.

PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT
===========================
Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request.

Claude's Full Response to User:
两个好问题。

---

**关于背调：**

能做。OKKI 数据里有客户公司名、国家、买家等级，我可以对 P0+P1 客户做背调——搜公司官网、LinkedIn、当地黄页、海关记录等公开信息。这对于判断客户真实身份很关键：

- OKKI 显示 L1+ 美国买家 → 背调发现是 3 人小店还是 50 万美金年采购额的区域批发商？完全不同的话术策略
- OKKI 显示沙特买家沉默 → 背调发现他同时在跟别的供应商询价？那他是在比价

**建议**：P0+P1 客户必做背调，作为阶段 3 的 Step 0（在五步分析前）。Backoffice 客户不需要。

---

**关于话术框架：**

你说得对，我收回之前那个"强制注入"的框架。那确实是死板的 checklist 思维。

真正的好话术来自于**我深度理解了客户的全部上下文**——他的对话历史、国家特征、采购阶段、卡点本质——然后给出"就应该是这句话"的判断。不是拼公式，是理解到位后的一句话。

我之前列那些强制变量，本质上是**不信任自己能把每个客户的情境都吃透**。但如果阶段 2 分类做对了、对话逐条读了、背调做了、专业外贸框架有了，我自然能写出针对性强的话术。

唯一的一条铁律应该是：**话术必须基于这个客户的具体对话内容，不能是通用模板。** 你能从话术里看出"这是在回复这个人"，而不是"任何客户都能用这段话"。

---

继续阶段 4？

Respond in this XML format:
<summary>
  <request>[Short title capturing the user's request AND the substance of what was discussed/done]</request>
  <investigated>[What has been explored so far? What was examined?]</investigated>
  <learned>[What have you learned about how things work?]</learned>
  <completed>[What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?]</completed>
  <next_steps>[What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?]</next_steps>
  <notes>[Additional insights or observations about the current progress]</notes>

    <item>行为趋势变化比时间阈值更有信息量：订单从500件降到100件比单纯沉默30天更值得警觉</item>
    <item>问价不买连续3次是"供应商B位"信号，客户在用你比价而非真正采购意向</item>
    <item>不同国家客户的沉默阈值不能统一：中东沉默5天是危险，欧洲沉默14天是正常</item>
    <item>母婴纺织品有明确的季节性采购窗口，可做自动"激活窗口期"标记</item>
    <item>价值分层的核心：VIP沉默7天就该提醒，低质客户沉默90天直接建议归档——资源分配由价值决定而非时间</item>
    <item>输出格式进化：一行提醒含客户名+国家+状态+风险+价值+建议+上次互动，决策信息一步到位</item>
  </learned>
  <completed>
    <item>重构客户状态为15+细分状态，覆盖未成交→已成交→休眠流失全链条</item>
    <item>新增5维度行为趋势检测（订单变小/响应变慢/问价不买/品类转移/回复人变）</item>
    <item>建立6地区差异化监控节奏表（决策周期+跟进密度+时间窗口）</item>
    <item>建立12个月季节性激活窗口日历（品类+目标市场映射）</item>
    <item>建立4级客户价值分层标准及与活跃度的交叉矩阵</item>
    <item>确立简洁单行输出格式（客户名+国家+状态+风险+价值+建议+上次互动）</item>
  </completed>
  <next_steps>等待用户确认是否有遗漏场景，用户可能补充更多监控维度或调整阈值参数后进入下一阶段</next_steps>
  <notes>这次升级体现了从"模板化规则"到"深度理解业务本质"的转变——不再是把客户套进时间桶，而是在理解采购行为逻辑、文化节奏、季节性规律的基础上做智能判断。这正是之前用户要求的"真正利用AI强大能力"方向。</notes>
</summary>
